LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonSuccessDesc: {0} answers the sigil. A hostile breach signature has entered the map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoMap: This sigil can only be used while the pawn is standing on an active map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_EncounterActive: An abyssal encounter is already active on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircle: No powered abyssal summoning circle is available.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBusy: All abyssal summoning circles are currently busy.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllUnpowered: All abyssal summoning circles are unpowered.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_AllBlocked: All abyssal summoning circles are blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoCircleAvailable: No valid abyssal summoning circle is available right now.
LanguageData.ABY_BossSummonFail_NoEdge: No valid breach point was found near the map edge.
LanguageData.ABY_SecretBossRevealDesc: The beast died before completing its first phase. The kill did not end the protocol. A greater breach is forming.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldIntegrationUnlockedDesc: The fragment analysis path has been opened. Decode a recovered herald core fragment at a hi-tech research bench to unlock Herald weapon and implant research.
LanguageData.ABY_SignalTheoryGuidanceDesc: Research Abyssal Signal Theory to begin the summon loop and unlock the first abyssal infrastructure.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstSigilGuidanceDesc: Forge an archon sigil at the Abyssal Forge, then activate it at a powered abyssal summoning circle to call the first boss.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisCompleteDesc: The recovered fragment has been successfully decoded at a hi-tech research bench. {0} and {1} are now accessible through the Abyssal Protocol research tab.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisAlreadyKnown: Herald fragment analysis is already complete. The fragment was returned.
LanguageData.ABY_HeraldAnalysisFailedMissingProject: Herald fragment analysis could not be resolved because the required research project was missing. The fragment was returned.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoHostileFaction: No hostile abyssal faction could be resolved for this summon.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoBossArrival: No valid abyssal boss arrival point could be found.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NotPlaced: The summoning circle must be placed before it can be used.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_Busy: The summoning circle is already processing another activation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_NoPower: The summoning circle is not powered.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_InteractionBlocked: The interaction cell for the summoning circle is blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleFail_FocusBlocked: The ritual focus area is blocked.
LanguageData.ABY_SigilPlacementFailed: The sigil could not find a valid summoning circle.
LanguageData.ABY_FirstBossKillDesc: The first abyssal boss has been destroyed. Herald-grade salvage is now flowing into your stockpiles. Keep feeding residue into an Abyssal Forge to deepen communion and unlock harsher patterns.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeProgressComplete: {0} residue offered / all current patterns unlocked
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeNextPatternDone: No further forge-gated patterns remain on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgePowerOffline: Forge reactor: offline — colony attunement is suspended
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOfferTip: The forge consumes residue directly from spawned stacks anywhere on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOfferHint: Offering residue is map-wide. Every threshold permanently unlocks new forge patterns for this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOfferNoneAvailable: No abyssal residue is currently available on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOfferComplete: Offered {0} abyssal residue to the forge. Communion total: {1}.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeUnlockLetterDesc:
The Abyssal Forge has stabilized a deeper communion tier. Current attunement state: {1}. Newly unlocked patterns:
{2}
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeAllPatternsUnlocked: All currently defined patterns in this channel are unlocked.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeNoUnlockedRecipes: No unlocked forge patterns are available in this category yet.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeClipboardLocked: This bill cannot be pasted here yet. Its pattern is still locked by forge communion.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeGizmoOfferDesc: Feed abyssal residue into the forge to unlock new patterns and sustain colony attunement.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeInspectResidue: Forge communion: {0} offered / {1} available on map
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeInspectAllKnown: All currently defined forge patterns are unlocked on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOverviewSubtitle: Map-wide residue communion, pattern unlocking, and colony attunement control.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOverviewHint: Open the full console for pattern browsing and bill management.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOpenConsoleDesc: Open the stylized forge control console with residue offerings, pattern browser, and bill management.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeConsoleSubtitle: Ritual-industrial control surface for residue intake, attunement shaping, and pattern deployment.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOfferHintShort: Map-wide intake. Patterns stay unlocked for this map.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgePreviewHint: Switch categories to narrow the channel. Locked patterns remain visible here so progression is easy to read.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOverviewSubtitleShort: Map-wide residue communion and pattern control.
LanguageData.ABY_ForgeOverviewHintCompact: Open the full console for pattern browsing, costs, and bill control.
